title: Galt Toys, Baking Set, Children's Real Baking Set, Ages 5 Years Plus
features: A fun, kids baking set for budding bakers with bright, colouful utensils
Use the tools and equipment to bake real cupcakes and cookies to decorate using the icing set
Have hours of fun with high-quality components and hands-on activities whilst learning at home
Our children's baking set includes rolling pin, spatula, whisk, 5 measuring spoons, 4 cookie cutters, 4 reusable silicone cupcake cases, cake stand, 8 cake toppers, 4 recipe cards and guide
Designed for ages 5 years and up with adult assistance - cakes and cookies requires oven baking
description: From the manufacturer Creative Activity Kits for Kids It’s time to let your imagination run wild with Creative Cases from Galt Toys. These exciting children’s craft kits include all the materials you need to inspire any young artist, whether they enjoy classic crafts such as painting, knitting or baking, or contemporary activities such as jewellery making and foil art. Each Galt children’s craft set encourages self-expression, innovation, and creativity, as well as helping to improve fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, decision making, and problem-solving skills. They’re the ideal birthday party gift or rainy-day activity for children. Create Great Bakes with Galt Brilliant First Baking Set for Kids On your marks, get set, bake – with the delightful Baking Set from Galt Toys. Using the bright and colourful utensils included, young bakers can produce delicious cupcakes and cute cookies, before decorating their tasty treats with the icing set and displaying their very own showstoppers on the jolly, jungle-themed cake stand. A Sensational Slice of Screen-free Fun Galt Baking Set is the perfect introduction to the world of brilliant bakes, containing the real tools budding bakers need to test their creativity and learn essential culinary skills. Work from 4 simple recipe cards and the easy-to-follow guide to enjoy valuable screen-free family time as you make and sample delectable vanilla and chocolate cupcakes and shortbread biscuit creations. Learning has Never Been so Delicious Galt crafts are an excellent way to boost confidence, as your budding baker gets to not only have fun while learning, they can also share their terrific bakes with friends and family. The Baking Set Creative Case also aids the development of fine motor skills, focus, as well as counting, measuring and problem-solving abilities.
